name: DARK HORIZON
briefing: The Alliance lost contact with the entire Iera system, including Cordis Station on Horizon.
Travel to Horizon, assess Cordis Station, and report back.

notes.label: ADDITIONAL NOTES
notes.body: We have no Alliance assets in the Iera system, and the nature of the blackout is unknown. Horizon has faced turmoil before. Use discretion.

body: The crew found a transmission relay in orbit, transmitting to the Omega Nebula; the relay station had been wiped before abandonment.

The mining facility concealed an underground research station where tests were run on miners. Mutated humans — "Adjutants" — remained contained, some breached. The crew vacated and crashed the relay into the facility.
